recipe.title: Black Bean Burritos with Spanish Rice

main.name: Black Bean Burrito Filling
ingredients: 3 (15 oz) cans black beans, rinsed & drained
1½ cups shredded cheese (cheddar or Mexican blend)
steps: Preheat oven to 350°F. Wrap tortillas in foil and bake 15 minutes until heated through.
Heat oil in a large skillet over medium heat. Add onion, bell pepper, garlic, and jalapeño; cook and stir for 2 minutes.
Stir in beans and cook until heated through, about 3 minutes. Stir in cream cheese and salt; cook, stirring occasionally, for 2 minutes. Stir in cilantro.
Spoon filling across the middle of each tortilla. Top with shredded cheese. Fold opposing edges to overlap filling, then roll into a burrito.
Serve immediately with sour cream and salsa.

side.name: Spanish Rice
ingredients: 2 boxes Spanish rice mix (Vigo or Zatarain's)
2 cups water + 1 tbsp butter per box
steps: Cook Spanish rice per package instructions.

recipe.notes: Can double the bean filling for extra leftovers. Filling can be prepped ahead and reheated. Freezes well without cheese/cilantro.
